jobs.description:
Are you interested in building high-performance, globally scalable Financial systems and infrastructure that support Amazon's current and future growth? Are you seeking an environment where you can drive innovation? Does the prospect of working with top finance and engineering talent get you charged up? If so, Amazon Finance Technology (FinTech) is for you!

Amazon FinTech is looking for a Senior Product Manager Technical (PM-T) to deliver long term scalable product that will help our Accounting and Finance customers improve financial reconciliations processes, accelerate financial close cycle, enhance controllership and reduce manual effort through automation.

We are seeking an experienced, results-oriented, self-motivated Technical Product Manager, having a bent for solving complex problems and delivering high quality technical products. You will be responsible for developing product strategy, defining product requirements working with global internal accounting teams, influencing stakeholders and engineering teams required to deliver an impactful product.

The ideal candidate for this role will have strong ownership, business and product sense combined with a solid understanding of financial and accounting concepts. You will need to thrive and succeed in an entrepreneurial environment without being hindered by ambiguity. High judgment, ability to influence, analytical talent, exceptional communications, the ability to partner with technical and non-technical stakeholders and leadership are essential to success in this role.

Key job responsibilities
- Define product requirements and execution strategy for an enterprise product

- Lead the product life cycle including vision, strategy, roadmap, requirements, user experience, delivery, launch, and support.

- Work with engineering, research, UX, technical program managers and stakeholders to deliver a successful product

- Collaborate with Amazon partner tech teams to ensure product re-usability and avoid redundancies.

- Managing both upwards and downwards communications effectively

About the team
FinTech’s charter is to enable Finance & Global Business Services (FGBS) teams, and amplify the benefit of FGBS teams to support the growth, expansion, and restructuring of the businesses. The Close Systems team owns coordination, execution and continuous improvement for month close processes across FGBS teams. We own developing automation to scale with Amazon’s growth, reduce manual effort and defects, streamline processes, and drive accountability across teams. The Close Systems team improves the financial close by developing automation to scale with Amazon’s growth, reduce manual effort and defects, streamline processes, and drive accountability across teams.

jobs.description:
Alexa+ is the world’s best Generative AI powered personal assistant / agent for consumers. We are seeking an experienced and entrepreneurial Senior Product Manager-Technical to lead key monetization initiatives for Amazon Alexa+. This product leader should have a successful track record of leading product initiatives from concept to successful launch. The ideal candidate is a self-starter with excellent product management skills, a strategic thinker, and a strong communicator with excellent cross-org collaboration skills. Experience in the following domains is preferred: e-commerce, online advertising, search, AI powered personal assistants, personalization and generative AI powered products.

As a Senior Product Manager-Technical for Alexa+ Monetization, you will drive product strategy, product definition, design, launch, and go-to-market for mission critical initiatives for Alexa+ Monetization. You will collaborate with engineering, business and partner teams to develop and launch new product initiatives, and maintain ownership over the course of the product life-cycle. Your work will impact hundreds of millions of customers world-wide and drive significant growth for Alexa+.

Key job responsibilities
• Drive the development of product strategy for Alexa+ Monetization.
• Create buy-in for the plan across the Alexa organization and partner teams in Amazon.
• Create product roadmaps for the key areas you are leading.
• Establish metrics and key performance indicators for success.
• Develop detailed business requirements, user stories, and product specifications.
• Partner with engineering and partner teams to drive product launch and business growth.

jobs.description:
We are looking for a Sr. Product Manager- Tech to join us on our Finance Automation team.

As a Senior Product owner, you will have end-to-end ownership of the customer experience, from defining the product vision through building and launching the product in partnership with front-end and back-end technical teams. In this role, you will work with a team of technical and non-technical stakeholders ranging from engineers, technical program managers and designers to product managers and marketers.

Key job responsibilities
Product Leadership:
Listen to and advocate for the customer
Define and prioritize the product roadmap (goals, customer use cases, requirements, features)
Contribute to product discovery via user research, customer interviews, and data analysis
Write press releases, FAQs, and business goals
Ensure business alignment across all teams

Technical Engagement:
Define both functional and non-functional technical requirements
Use technical expertise to contribute to development discussions on product solution design and construction
Engage deeply on technical decisions with engineering teams (internal and/or external)

jobs.description:
Amazon Services offers services to sellers in multiple countries to sell on Amazon websites globally and grow multi-channel commerce. See www.amazonservices.com for details of products and services. Amazon Global Selling is an important initiative to grow the Amazon Marketplace Seller Business around the world, with the India team focusing on helping Indian sellers list on other Amazon global marketplaces. This business will play an important role in Amazon’s mission to be the place where customers can find and discover anything they want to buy on Earth. We are looking for a Senior Product Manager. This person will have the exciting opportunity to deliver on a strategy to enable the growth of global selling from India and will play a key role in influencing policies impacting Manufacturers and Exporters in India wishing to sell on global Amazon websites.
The India Global Selling Product team collaborates with many Amazon’s global teams to support the high-growth global selling business, continuously identify new opportunities, and drive new initiatives through design, development, launch, and post-launch management. We are seeking a talented, data driven, and proven Senior Product Manager to lead strategic initiatives in developing and optimizing solutions for India Global Selling. This role will be responsible for building innovative products and AI-driven solutions that enable sellers' success across their lifecycle on Amazon's global marketplaces. The ideal candidate should be able to work in a cross functional, fast-paced environment; has strong product/program management and communication skills and proven experience on influencing cross-org global stakeholders.
Key Job Responsibilities:
• Identify opportunities across the Global Selling seller life cycle, build new products/services to help the growth and success of GS sellers, define go-to-market strategy and drive the success of the products.
• Identify operational inefficiencies faced by internal teams (Account Reps/Managers) and develop tools to enhance team productivity and decision-making capabilities
• Design and develop AI-powered solutions to identify potential products in different functions
• Work with business and marketing functions to drive go-to-market plan
• Drive continuous improvement in operational efficiency through technology innovation
• Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders across different regions

jobs.description:
Amazon Now is seeking an experienced Product Manager to lead the development and optimization of customer experiences specifically designed for new customers in our quick commerce business. This role will be instrumental in driving customer acquisition, engagement, and retention through innovative product solutions that simplify and enhance the first-time user journey.



Key job responsibilities
Customer Experience & Product Strategy
• Own the end-to-end product strategy for new customer acquisition and onboarding experiences across the Amazon Now platform
• Define and execute a product roadmap that reduces friction and accelerates time-to-first-order for new customers
• Leverage data analytics and customer insights to identify pain points in the new customer journey and develop solutions that drive conversion and engagement
• Design and implement personalized experiences that help new customers discover relevant products and understand the value proposition of quick commerce
Cross-Functional Leadership
• Partner with engineering, design, marketing, operations, and business teams to deliver seamless customer experiences
• Collaborate with regional teams to ensure product solutions are tailored to local market needs and customer preferences
• Work closely with data science teams to build predictive models and recommendation systems optimized for new customer behavior
• Coordinate with customer service teams to incorporate feedback and resolve customer pain points
Metrics & Impact
• Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for new customer acquisition, activation, and early retention
• Conduct A/B testing and experimentation to optimize conversion funnels and customer engagement
• Analyze customer cohorts and behavioral patterns to inform product decisions and prioritization
• Drive measurable improvements in new customer conversion rates, order frequency, and customer lifetime value
Innovation & Market Intelligence
• Stay current on quick commerce trends, competitive landscape, and emerging customer needs in the Indian market
• Identify opportunities to differentiate Amazon Now's new customer experience from competitors
• Champion customer-centric innovation and advocate for new customer needs across the organization

jobs.description:
This role is a Senior Product Manager - Customer experience (CX) role in the Smart Commerce team.

Amazon Smart Commerce is a comprehensive suite of Agentic solutions that helps D2C brands scale build and scale online commerce on their own websites and social media channels.

Senior Product Manager - Customer experience (CX) owns the core shopping platform which brands leverage to build their own websites which customers would love to shop on.

The key responsibilities include partnering with key stakeholders across business & technology teams to formulate, prioritize, and execute the product roadmap tailored to the unique needs of online shoppers. The role is also expected to influence 3P development partners to develop solutions that cater to the diverse requirements of our customers.

The ideal candidate for this position comes with strong product management experience, is customer obsessed, data-driven, and is able to operate with minimal supervision. They should have strong problem-solving skills, be able to influence partner teams, and juggle multiple tasks with competing deadlines.

Key job responsibilities
Roadmap Management: Define high quality product roadmap based on business strategy and voice of customer. Manage a cross-functional process to translate the desired customer experience into a logically sequenced and optimized product roadmap. - Create buy-in for the product roadmap with internal and external stakeholders.
Requirements Definition: Partner with UX design team to develop high quality requirements and manage the scope of each product launch to deliver key capabilities on time.
Product Roll-out: Create and execute go-to-market plans for new products and features. Work closely with product engineering to develop product(s) and go-to-market teams (marketing) to drive adoption. * Define and monitor key performance metrics to ensure performance, and continually optimize operational efficiencies.
Be comfortable with hands-on, day-to-day problem solving, implementing quick and effective action plans to meet short term priorities. Equally comfortable in generating a 3-year strategic vision.
Prepare and present business reviews to senior management

Basic Qualifications

1. Bachelor's degree
2. Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
3. Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
4. Experience contributing to engineering discussions around technology decisions and strategy related to a product
5. Experience managing technical products or online services
6. Experience in representing and advocating for a variety of critical customers and stakeholders during executive-level prioritization and planning
Preferred Qualifications
1. Experience in using analytical tools, such as Tableau, Qlikview, QuickSight
2. Experience in building and driving adoption of new features

jobs.description:
Are you passionate about innovation and making an immediate impact on customers' lives? Are you a data-driven, technical product leader with experience launching enterprise software?

As a Sr. Product Manager Technical, you will be responsible for:

- Generating direct revenue as our products improve enterprises' customer or staff experiences, reduce operating costs, and generate incremental revenue;
- Managing a portfolio of enterprise SaaS subscriptions for verticals as well as building horizontal services (e.g., common management APIs, communication and personalization features, device and experience management software) that enable Alexa to serve multiple customer segments
- Designing strategies to deepen existing customers' relationships with Alexa outside of the home
- Collaborating with direct customers and channel partners to provide them with APIs and Self-Service User Interfaces to include Alexa Smart Properties AI voice experiences in their own industry products.

Key job responsibilities
• Develop requirements, product specifications, go-to-market plans, and marketing campaigns for key product features.
• Lead the product vision and go-to-market strategy for a new strategic business.
• Create buy-in for your vision across the Alexa organization and with external partners.
• Influence leaders across engineering, design, business development, solutions architecture, marketing, PR, legal, and finance to deliver exceptional results.
• Establish key performance indicators, drive feature adoption, and measure the health of your product and business.
• Create and influence product roadmaps across a large organization.

A day in the life
As a Sr. PMT, you'll define the vision and business plan for a new Alexa venture, gaining support from customers, partners, and executives. You'll work with design and engineering to create product requirements and user experiences. Collaborating with marketing, PR, and business development, you'll strategize product launches and drive adoption. You'll develop roadmaps with business development, solutions architecture, and finance to meet P&L goals. Additionally, you'll partner with customers and channel partners to provide APIs for integrating Alexa Smart Properties voice experiences into their products.

jobs.description:
Amazon.in Consumables team is seeking an outstanding Senior Product Manager. In this complex role, you will own and scale Subscribe & Save (SnS) program.

We are looking for an outstanding Product Manager who will help shape the future of SnS in India. The Product manager will use a combination of exceptional customer experience focus, analytical skills, and strategic thinking to improve the customer experience. The product manager will work customer backwards to build a customer experience for the Products that will keenly shape the way consumers shop for everyday essential products across consumables & other categories. This role also requires engaging actively with global teams to understand the best practices from other locales as well as tweak experience for India based on the unique business environment and unique customer requirement of India.


This role calls for an individual who can own all aspects of SnS Product - Vision, Roadmap, Tech discussion, partner tech and business team in Indian and WW. It requires an individual to showcase judgment and decision making skills to prioritize the right thing for customer This position offers a broad exposure to various business, financial, and technical teams within Amazon.

The ideal candidate will possess a background of both strong product management as well as business management, demonstrates a passion for working on behalf of customers, is very self-driven, enjoys and excels at dealing with ambiguity, have a track record of on-time delivery of cross-functional projects, and have the ability to operate independently and autonomously; demonstrates ability to make decision based on data and is able to influence multiple stakeholders.

Key job responsibilities
- 5+ years in product management
- Proven track record of owning and delivering innovative experiences to customers.
- Demonstrated ability to translate customer needs into product requirements.
- Proven track record of building Product Vision, executing the roadmap by working closely with Tech and Business teams.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Strong analytical and quantitative skills; ability to use hard data and metrics to back up assumptions and evaluate outcomes.
- Proven ability to successfully thrive in an ambiguous environment and changing market conditions.
Bias for action; Demonstrated ability to conceptualize, manage, and prioritize multiple projects.
Innovative; loves to challenge status quo and reinvent on behalf of our customers.

jobs.description:
We are seeking an experienced Sr. Mobile Growth- Product Manager to architect and drive mobile app adoption, engagement, and monetization systems across emerging marketplaces. This role requires deep technical expertise to own the end-to-end mobile growth technology stack, working cross-functionally to design scalable solutions that deliver measurable business impact. As a PM, you'll bridge product strategy with technical execution, making critical engineering trade-offs while defining system architecture, API contracts, and integration paradigms across multiple platform teams.

Key job responsibilities
Product Strategy & Ownership

* Own and drive the mobile growth product roadmap for emerging marketplaces, focusing on customer acquisition, activation, engagement, and retention
* Define and execute strategies to increase mobile app penetration and engagement across key marketplaces
* Build and scale mobile growth capabilities including Paid App Marketing (PAM) campaigns, in-app experiences, and growth experimentation frameworks
* Partner with EMXO Mobile Growth Business leader, Country teams and WW tech organizations to prioritize and deliver high-impact mobile features

Product Strategy & System Architecture

* Define and own the technical architecture for mobile growth systems, including PAM campaign management platforms, attribution frameworks, and experimentation infrastructure
* Make critical engineering trade-off decisions balancing performance, scalability, maintainability, and time-to-market
* Architect solutions that handle marketplace-specific requirements while maintaining code reusability and operational efficiency
* Drive technical roadmap alignment across EMXO Marketing Tech, EMXO Mobile Growth Business Leader, Country Mobile Leaders and marketplace-specific engineering organizations, as needed.

About the team
The Emerging Marketplaces Cross Org team for (EMXO) Prime, Lifecycle and XCM (PLX) builds core capabilities to accelerate customer growth, engagement, and Prime membership across ten emerging countries. Our work is organized around three pivotal growth pillars: Customer Growth, Customer Engagement, and Prime Growth. The Mobile Growth function sits at the heart of our Customer Growth strategy. We serve diverse countries including India, Brazil, Mexico, Australia, Singapore, UAE, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and South Africa-each with unique customer needs and growth trajectories.
This is a high-impact role where you'll shape mobile strategy for some of the world's fastest-growing marketplaces.

jobs.description:
There are millions of small and medium businesses across India, Brazil, Mexico, Middle East, etc. who sign up as sellers on Amazon. Emerging Marketplace Seller Experience organization is focused on helping sellers with the right set of tools and best practices that can enable them to start and accelerate business growth on Amazon. Team focus on builds products that helps Sellers register and get the first sale quickly, and equip them for long term success on Amazon. For others, the team ideates new ways to reduce friction, automate task and guided workflows that drive faster actions for sellers, translating into growth.

Are you customer obsessed, flexible, smart and analytical, strategic yet execution focused and passionate about e-commerce? Are you an experienced, entrepreneurial leader with a strong work ethic? If yes, this opportunity will appeal to you. We are looking for a Senior Product Manager who is enthusiastic about managing innovative initiatives. He or she will be comfortable marshaling large amounts of data to make decisions and build business cases and providing strategic recommendations. We are looking for a Product Manager who shares Amazon's passion for the customer—someone who understands the importance of compelling delivery programs in creating an overall delightful customer experience.


As the senior product manager, you will define product offerings which are innovative and will simplify the seller experience, while allowing only quality sellers, improving customer experience and accounting for legal and compliance requirements. You will be a pragmatic visionary that can translate business needs into product solutions that scale both technically and operationally. You will also drive the execution of these initiatives by working with technology teams and multiple seller services teams to set strategy, set high standards, define the product, and make the hard, high-judgment trade-offs between customer experience, performance, features, and speed-to-market.

The position is located in Bangalore, India.




Key job responsibilities
Primary Responsibilities
- Product Strategy and Direction: Continually assess the needs of sellers, market trends, competitive opportunities and threats in defining and evolving the product strategy in your area of product ownership.
- Roadmap Planning: Manage a cross-functional process for prioritizing and planning the roadmap and major product releases.
- Requirements Definition: Develop comprehensive product plans, incorporating market requirements and the competitive arena. Produce high quality BRD’s and effectively prioritize and manage the scope of each product launch to deliver key capabilities on time and on budget. Work closely with Legal and Tax on regulations and compliance requirements to eliminate seller adoption bottlenecks.
- Product Roll-out: Create and execute go-to-market plans for new features. Monitor key performance metrics to ensure product performance and identify optimization opportunities. Partner closely with the Sale and Business Development leader to drive adoption and ensure processes for on boarding that are easy and intuitive.
- Seller Success: Drive product innovation to improve self-service capabilities for sellers to achieve and grow online sales success. Drive innovations to all elements of the seller experience to improve their business results post implementation.
